meanings.definition: carve, cut, or etch into a material or surface
examples: engraved the trophy cupt with the winner's
the lovers scratched their names into the bark of the tree

meanings.definition: register formally as a participant or member
examples: The party recruited many new members

meanings.definition: draw within a figure so as to touch in as many places as possible
write, engrave, or print as a lasting record

examples: We should encode the message for security reasons

meanings.definition: address, (a work of literature) in a style less formal than a dedication
